anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The standard declares this exact author skill id, and its used-by organ set resolves the route-observability mechanism that validates public route feedback and trace routing without claiming private transcript or live-session authority.

title: Microcosm Agent Trace Author
triggers: The agent-trace standard declares this author skill and needs governed trace rows instead of planned triad pressure.
The trace instance can be authored from manifest ids, public route-observability evidence, copied non-secret source-module manifests, receipts, and authority boundaries.
workflow: Read the standard JSON, macro manifest source refs, used-by organ rows, route-observability mechanism, receipts, and generated lattice health before authoring.
Write only source-backed trace identity, route evidence, source refs, receipt refs, omissions, anti-claims, and authority boundary fields.
Regenerate the skill corpus and lattice projections, and keep private transcript contents, live-session behavior, provider execution, and whole-system correctness outside the claim ceiling.
